title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

example.firstSentence: She decided to give up competitive swimming.

questions.firstSentence: Someone has taken all the chairs from the room.
questions.secondSentence: All the chairs have (1) _________ from the room.

questions.firstSentence: I'm sure he knows the answer.
The view was so spectacular that we took lots of photos.
questions.secondSentence: It was (1) _________ that we took lots of photos.

questions.firstSentence: She wanted to know if he had ever worked abroad.
questions.secondSentence: She (1) _________ he had ever worked abroad.

questions.firstSentence: Despite being poorly paid, she loved her job.
questions.secondSentence: She loved her job (1) _________ she was poorly paid.

questions.firstSentence: He took up rock climbing at the age of forty.
questions.secondSentence: He (1) _________ rock climbing at the age of forty.
